request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people worry about privacy, but have you seen what happens when agencies can't act fast enough? My neighbor's kid was almost caught in that cross-border trafficking ring last year. The feds had all the data but couldn't share it with local police in time. We need to update these laws so good people can do their jobs. #ModernizeSecurity #ProtectOurKids
